items.title_en: PocketLLM – Run local LLMs from a USB stick
items.title_zh: PocketLLM：从 U 盘运行本地大模型
items.summary_en: Hacker News: PocketLLM is an open-source project that packages a local LLM runtime onto a USB stick, enabling users to run large language models on any compatible machine without installation. The project targets privacy-conscious users and air-gapped environments where cloud AI is unavailable.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：PocketLLM 是一个开源项目，将本地大模型运行环境打包到 U 盘，让用户在任意兼容设备上无需安装即可运行大语言模型，主要面向注重隐私及无网络环境的用户群体。

items.title_en: Apple's accidental moat: How the "AI Loser" may end up winning
items.title_zh: 苹果的意外护城河：这位「AI 落后者」或许最终胜出
items.summary_en: Hacker News: An analysis arguing that Apple's privacy-focused, on-device AI strategy—often mocked as behind OpenAI and Google—may become a structural competitive advantage as regulatory scrutiny of cloud AI data practices intensifies and users increasingly demand local, private inference.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一篇分析文章指出，苹果以隐私为核心、聚焦端侧推理的 AI 策略——常被嘲讽落后于 OpenAI 和谷歌——随着云端 AI 数据合规监管趋严及用户对本地私密推理需求上升，可能演变为结构性竞争优势。

items.title_en: Show HN: A better alternative to CLI and MCP for local agentic tools
items.title_zh: Show HN：本地智能体工具的 CLI/MCP 替代方案——命名管道
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A developer shares named-pipes, a Unix named-pipe-based IPC framework for locally running agentic tools that provides stateful in-memory communication faster than MCP or CLI subprocesses. Includes a CLI tool (cpipe), HTTP server mode, and an ACP server for Claude Code integration.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：开发者发布 named-pipes，一个基于 Unix 命名管道的本地智能体工具 IPC 框架，提供有状态内存通信，速度快于 MCP 或 CLI 子进程，附带 cpipe 命令行工具、HTTP 服务器模式及面向 Claude Code 的 ACP 服务器接口。

items.title_en: ReceiptBot – Stop Node.js AI agents from reading .env and burning your budget
items.title_zh: ReceiptBot：防止 Node.js AI 智能体读取 .env 文件超额消费
items.summary_en: Hacker News: ReceiptBot is an open-source Node.js middleware that intercepts AI agent API calls, enforces per-session token budgets, and blocks file-system reads of sensitive config files like .env. It targets developers building cost-controlled agentic pipelines to prevent runaway spend.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：ReceiptBot 是一个开源 Node.js 中间件，拦截 AI 智能体 API 调用、按会话强制执行 Token 预算，并阻止读取 .env 等敏感配置文件，面向需要成本控制的智能体开发者。

items.title_en: Writing should have a soul and its own Claude Skill
items.title_zh: 写作应有灵魂：开源我的 Claude 写作 Skill
items.summary_en: Hacker News: The team at Lago open-sources their internal Claude writing skill—a structured system prompt that enforces style consistency, voice, and editorial principles across AI-assisted writing. The post argues that AI-assisted writing needs opinionated guardrails to preserve a brand's authentic voice.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：Lago 团队开源其内部 Claude 写作 Skill——一套结构化系统提示词，用于在 AI 辅助写作中保持文风一致性与编辑原则，作者认为 AI 辅助写作需要有主见的约束机制以保留品牌真实声音。

items.title_zh: 别养龙虾了，硅谷Agent新潮流是「爱马仕」
items.summary_zh: 量子位：开源AI Agent工具Hermes Agent在GitHub上线一月标星超6.66万。该Agent强调持续学习与自我进化，完成复杂任务后自动提取可复用Skills并持续改进。最新版原生接入微信，支持图片、视频、文件、语音消息，安装仅需一行命令。

items.title_zh: Claude未公开Mythos被质疑采用字节Seed架构
items.summary_zh: 量子位：社区热议Anthropic内部未公开的Mythos模型是否采用字节Seed团队的循环语言模型架构，Yoshua Bengio亦参与该论文。Mythos在GraphWalks BFS测试中超越GPT-5.4，与循环架构擅长图搜索的特性高度吻合，暗示进步来自架构创新而非Scaling Law。

items.title_zh: AI Hedge Fund开源：巴菲特芒格炼化为投资Agent
items.summary_zh: 量子位：开源项目AI Hedge Fund将巴菲特、芒格等12位顶级投资人炼化为AI Agent，内置6位分析师汇总观点，支持实时分析与回测。兼容OpenAI、Anthropic、Groq、DeepSeek等13种大模型，支持本地运行，已获GitHub 51.7k Star和9k+Fork，由独立开发者Virat Singh打造。

items.title_zh: 智能座舱供应商冲刺港股，估值630亿
items.summary_zh: 量子位：国内智能座舱解决方案头部供应商宣布冲刺港股IPO，估值630亿元，是小米、理想、小鹏等多家车企共同供应商，业务聚焦汽车智能座舱芯片及系统，市占率位居同赛道首位。

items.title_en: Mark Zuckerberg is reportedly building an AI clone to replace him in meetings
items.title_zh: 扎克伯格据报开发 AI 数字分身以代为参加会议
items.summary_en: The Verge: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is reportedly developing an AI clone of himself to attend meetings and handle interactions on his behalf. The system would use generative AI to replicate his communication style and decision-making patterns, enabling him to be effectively present in more engagements simultaneously.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：据报道，Meta CEO 马克·扎克伯格正在开发自己的 AI 数字分身，用于代替本人参加会议和处理互动事务。该系统将利用生成式 AI 复制其沟通风格与决策模式，让其同时出席更多场合。

items.title_en: Sam Altman reportedly targeted in second attack
items.title_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼据报再次遭遇人身攻击
items.summary_en: The Verge: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman was reportedly targeted in a second violent incident at his home, following a prior case where a 20-year-old was arrested for throwing a Molotov cocktail at his residence. The escalating incidents raise ongoing security concerns for prominent AI executives.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：OpenAI CEO 山姆·奥尔特曼据报在家中再次遭遇暴力事件，此前已有一名 20 岁男子因向其住所投掷燃烧瓶而被捕，高知名度 AI 高管的人身安全风险持续引发关注。

items.title_en: The largest orbital compute cluster is open for business
items.title_zh: 史上最大轨道计算集群正式开业
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Kepler Communications has launched the world's largest orbital compute cluster with 40 GPUs operating in Earth orbit. Its latest customer Sophia Space marks a commercial milestone for space-based AI computing, enabling low-latency compute for satellite-adjacent applications.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Kepler Communications 在地球轨道部署 40 块 GPU，打造出史上最大轨道计算集群并正式开放服务，最新客户 Sophia Space 的接入标志着太空 AI 算力商业化迈出重要一步。

items.title_en: European AI: A playbook to own it
items.title_zh: 欧洲 AI 战略手册：如何掌握主导权
items.summary_en: Hacker News (Mistral): Mistral AI has published a strategic playbook on how Europe can assert leadership in global AI. It covers sovereign compute infrastructure, regulatory positioning, talent retention, and competitive strategies for European AI companies against US and Chinese rivals.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News（Mistral）：Mistral AI 发布欧洲 AI 战略手册，阐述欧洲如何在全球 AI 竞争中争取主导权，涵盖主权算力基础设施建设、监管定位、人才留用及欧洲 AI 企业竞争策略。

items.title_en: I ran Gemma 4 as a local model in Codex CLI
items.title_zh: 在 Codex CLI 中本地运行 Gemma 4
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A developer demonstrates running Google's Gemma 4 model locally inside OpenAI's Codex CLI, covering installation, configuration, and coding task results. The walkthrough shows that open-weight models can now competently power agentic coding workflows without cloud dependencies.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一名开发者演示了在 OpenAI Codex CLI 中本地运行 Google Gemma 4 模型的全流程，涵盖安装配置与实际编程任务测试，证明开源权重模型已可独立支撑 Agent 编程工作流。

items.title_en: AI could be the end of the digital wave, not the next big thing
items.title_zh: AI 或许是数字浪潮的终结而非下一个风口
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A contrarian analysis arguing AI represents the culmination of the digital computing wave rather than the start of a new one. Drawing on technology S-curves, the piece suggests AI may concentrate rather than democratize economic value, raising questions about long-term structural transformation.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一篇反向分析认为 AI 是数字计算浪潮的终点而非新起点，援引技术 S 曲线理论指出 AI 可能集中而非分散经济价值，对长期结构性转型具有深远影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Claudraband – Claude Code for the Power User
items.title_zh: Claudraband：专为高级用户打造的 Claude Code 增强工具
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Claudraband is an open-source interface built on top of Claude Code, offering multi-session management, workflow automation, and enhanced context handling. Targeting developers who need fine-grained control over complex agentic coding tasks.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：Claudraband 是构建在 Claude Code 之上的开源高级用户界面，提供多会话管理、工作流自动化和增强上下文处理，专为需要精细控制复杂 Agent 编程任务的开发者设计。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a social media management tool in 3 weeks with Claude and Codex
items.title_zh: 用 Claude 和 Codex 三周构建社交媒体管理工具
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A developer shares their experience building a full-featured social media management tool in three weeks using Claude and Codex as AI coding assistants, demonstrating the rapid development velocity achievable with AI-assisted software engineering.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一名开发者分享借助 Claude 和 Codex 仅用三周构建完整社交媒体管理工具的经历，展示了 AI 辅助软件工程所能实现的极速开发效率。

items.title_zh: 入职Meta的吴翼，清华叉院官网已撤其教职信息
items.summary_zh: 量子位：清华大学交叉信息研究院官网已下撤吴翼的教职相关信息，吴翼此前已正式入职 Meta AI。此事折射出顶尖 AI 研究人才加速向科技巨头流动的趋势，也引发学界对高校 AI 人才保留机制的关注。
